title: Coastline Harmony And Sussex Harmonisers Concert
description: Come and listen to some beautiful a cappella singing in four-part harmony by four local Sussex choirs. Ladies chorus Coastline Harmony - based in Southwick have invited their friends at Sussex Harmonisers to join them to entertain you. Sussex Harmonisers has three choruses: The men sing in Sussex Kings of Harmony, the ladies in Sussex A Cappella and jointly they are The Sussex Harmonisers. Refreshments will be available for purchase during the interval.
